brand.name: VedArc Legal
brand.tagline: A modern veda for Indian legal practice.
brand.description: VedArc Legal is a comprehensive legal upskilling platform designed for in-house counsels and corporate legal teams who manage litigation and legal risk without structured exposure to court processes. It also serves practising advocates seeking to develop contract drafting and advisory capability.

footer.colophon: Set in Cormorant Garamond and EB Garamond. Made in India, 2026.

pillars.title: Cross-Skilling Expertise
pillars.body: Litigation insight for corporate lawyers; advisory competence for practising advocates.

pillars.title: Practice-Led Learning
pillars.body: Real disputes, real contracts, real decision-making. No abstractions, no recycled lectures.

pillars.title: Indian Legal Context
pillars.body: Designed around domestic statutes, tribunals, corporate frameworks, and procedural realities.

pillars.title: Expert-Led Faculty
pillars.body: Delivered by in-house counsels, practising advocates, retired judges, and legal researchers.

audiences.label: In-House Counsel
audiences.summary: Manage disputes, brief external counsel, and report to the board with procedural fluency.

audiences.label: Practising Advocates
audiences.summary: Build contract drafting and advisory capability that wins commercial mandates.

audiences.label: Corporate Legal Teams
audiences.summary: Customised programs anchored in your sector, your disputes, your risk profile.

audiences.label: Universities & Law Schools
audiences.summary: Practice-ready training in litigation and contracts for students entering the profession.
